title: 'Ebyathar #0054
definition:
Abiathar = "my father is great"

 1) priest, son of Ahitub (Ahimelech), faithful to David, but
    later rebelled with Adonijah
nasbUsage:
Definition: Abiathar = "my father is great"

 1) priest, son of Ahitub (Ahimelech), faithful to David, but
    later rebelled with Adonijah

    NASB:  the great one is father, an Isr. priest
